facility_knn_assignment.repair: generic prepared fixed-radius threshold-reached count on Embree
facility_knn_assignment.boundary: Coverage decision only; not exact K=3 fallback ranking.

polygon_pair_overlap_area_rows.repair: CPU-partner bbox broadphase candidates plus native exact-area summary
polygon_pair_overlap_area_rows.boundary: Partner candidate policy; not RT candidate discovery and not broad polygon overlay.

polygon_set_jaccard.repair: CPU-partner bbox broadphase candidates plus native Jaccard set-area summary
polygon_set_jaccard.boundary: Diagnostic Jaccard summary; not fused GPU Jaccard and not broad polygon overlay.

hausdorff_distance.repair: generic prepared fixed-radius threshold-reached count on Embree for Hausdorff <= radius decision
hausdorff_distance.boundary: Threshold decision only; not exact Hausdorff distance/witness.

ann_candidate_search.repair: generic prepared fixed-radius threshold-reached count on Embree for candidate coverage
ann_candidate_search.boundary: Candidate coverage decision only; not exact ANN ranking or recall optimizer.

design_findings: The Embree CPU path was slow when app examples asked KNN/exact-distance rows to answer a decision-summary question.
Generic fixed-radius threshold/count is the right engine primitive for coverage, ANN candidate coverage, and Hausdorff threshold decisions.
Exact polygon overlap/Jaccard was slow because candidate discovery used multiple positive RT probes; a CPU partner bbox broadphase is a faster app-level candidate policy before native exact summary.

The richer exact semantics remain separate requirements: exact ranked KNN, exact Hausdorff distance/witness, and broad polygon overlay need future generic partner primitives or spatial-index adapters.
